meta.title: Reflex Duels - Brain Games | Fast Reflex & Puzzle Battles for iOS
meta.description: Think fast. Act faster. Reflex Duels features 20+ brain-bending mini-games - reaction speed tests, trivia, puzzles, and 2-player duels. Download free on iOS.

hero.subtitle: 20+ brain-bending mini-games designed to challenge your reflexes, logic, and focus - all in seconds.

solo.title: Solo - Endless Mode
solo.desc: Push through 9 speed zones - from Calm to Impossible. Every correct answer builds your streak multiplier and score. How long can you survive as the timer keeps shrinking?

daily.title: Daily Challenge
daily.desc: Same 20 puzzles for every player, every day. Race against the clock at 2.5 seconds per round. Climb the daily leaderboard and build your streak.

versus.title: 2 Players - Split-Screen
versus.desc: Hand your iPhone to a friend and go head-to-head on the same screen. 10 rounds of reflex-testing mini-games. No second device needed.

screenshots.alt_home: Reflex Duels home screen - choose Solo, Daily Challenge, or 2 Players mode
screenshots.alt_splitscreen: Reflex Duels 2-player split-screen mode - head-to-head brain game duels on one iPhone
screenshots.alt_minigames: Reflex Duels mini-games variety - math, colors, symbols, and more brain training puzzles
screenshots.alt_solo: Reflex Duels solo mode gameplay - 9 speed zones from Calm to Impossible
screenshots.alt_daily: Reflex Duels daily challenge - same puzzles for all players worldwide every day
screenshots.alt_gameover: Reflex Duels game over screen - score, stats, streaks, and global leaderboard

minigames.title: 20+ Mini-Games
minigames.desc: Math, Stroop tests, symbol search, flag quizzes, dice puzzles, reaction games, and more. Every round is a different brain challenge.

zones.title: 9 Speed Zones
zones.desc: Progressive difficulty from Calm to Impossible. The timer shrinks with every zone - can you reach the final stage?

gamecenter.title: Game Center
gamecenter.desc: 35 achievements to unlock. Track your progress with scores, streaks, perfect zones, and total rounds played.

daily.title: Daily Challenges
daily.desc: A new set of 20 puzzles every day. Compete globally on the same challenge and earn free tokens.

leaderboards.title: Global Leaderboards
leaderboards.desc: Climb the all-time solo rankings and the daily challenge leaderboard. See how you stack up worldwide.

design.title: Dark Theme
design.desc: Zero distractions. Clean dark interface with instant haptic feedback. Every millisecond counts.

cta.subtitle: Download Reflex Duels and find out.

footer.tagline: Reflex Duels - Brain Training & Reflex Game for iOS
